title: June 2023 Stock Considerations

This month, I continue to look at some of the same names in months past.

title: Lumen Vs. Verizon: The Dividend Lesson

That article examined the caveats hidden behind the 10% yield and cautioned investors to avoid the dividend trap. Indeed, the company has to eliminate its dividends and its stock price collapsed.

title: 6/1/23: Verizon declares quarterly dividend

The quarterly dividend is payable on August 1, 2023, to Verizon shareholders of record at the close of business on July 10, 2023.
